---
name: 🟢 Good First Issue
description: Create a beginner-friendly task with clear instructions.
labels: ["good first issue", "beginner"]
---

# Good First Issue Template

*Note for maintainers: Use this template to create beginner-friendly issues. Be specific and welcoming!*

## 🟢 Problem
<!-- Describe the problem clearly. Avoid jargon. -->

## 🎯 Expected Outcome
<!-- What does success look like? What should the user see after the fix? -->

## 🧩 Where to Edit
<!-- List the files that need to be modified. -->

## ⚡ Proposed Steps
<!-- Provide a clear, step-by-step guide for the contributor. -->
1. Fork the repo and clone locally.
2. Create a branch.
3. Modify `file/path.py`.
4. Run tests to verify.

## 🧪 How to Verify
<!-- Which tests should the contributor run to verify their changes? -->
```bash
pytest tests/test_module.py
```

## 🤝 Need Help?
<!-- Let them know where to ask for help. -->
If you have any questions, feel free to comment on this issue or join our [Discussions](https://github.com/Khanz9664/TrustLens/discussions).
